review_text: An absolute masterpiece! The acting, the cinematography, and the score all came together to create an unforgettable experience. I will watch this again and again.
Simply brilliant. One of the best films of the decade with a stellar performance by the lead actor.
This is the worst movie I have ever seen. Terrible plot, awful acting, and a complete waste of time and money.
An absolute disaster. I cannot believe someone funded this garbage. Do yourself a favor and avoid it.
To be honest, it was not as good as the trailer made it out to be. Quite disappointing.
I went in with low expectations, but it was actually not bad at all. A pleasant surprise.
The villain was never convincing, and the plot lacked any real tension.
The visuals were absolutely stunning, but the storyline was incredibly weak and full of plot holes.
I loved the acting and the soundtrack, but the pacing in the middle was so slow I almost fell asleep.
A very uneven film. The first half is a thrilling action ride, while the second half devolves into a boring melodrama.

Although it starts off with a lot of promise and features some of the best CGI I have seen this year, the movie ultimately falls flat because the director could not decide whether he wanted to make a serious sci-fi epic or a lighthearted comedy, leaving the audience confused and detached from the main characters.

While critics might argue that the script is somewhat derivative of 80s action films, I found the nostalgic homage perfectly executed, blending great choreography with just enough modern flair to keep it fresh and extremely entertaining.
Well, that was certainly something.
It is what it is. Neither here nor there.
Oh wow, another superhero movie where a giant beam of light shoots into the sky to destroy the city. How completely original and groundbreaking. Give this writer an Oscar.
If you enjoy staring at a blank wall for two hours, this is the perfect cinematic adventure for you.
They somehow managed to make a high-speed car chase feel incredibly boring. Truly an impressive feat.
I was on the edge of my seat the entire time! A brilliant thriller.
The lead actress carried the entire film on her shoulders. Without her, it would be unwatchable.
Totally disjointed and messy. A huge letdown after such a great prequel.
